title: Thickness-Dependent Magneto Transport of Bi2Se3/SiO2 Topological Insulator thin films

classification_notes: There is a notable inconsistency in the supplied paper-analysis summary: the paper title/abstract concern Bi2Se3/SiO2 thin films, but the summary mentions Ni3In2S2 single crystals. I treated the explicit file evidence conservatively and did not infer dataset types from the paper summary alone.

file_classifications.reasoning: This file is best interpreted as documentation (the paper/preprint itself), not a dataset. There is no evidence that it contains figure-ready or raw data tables. Because the task is to classify dataset files, the PDF is not counted as Type 1 or Type 2.

paper_analysis.summary: The paper reports crystal growth and magneto-transport measurements on Ni$_3$In$_2$S$_2$ single crystals, identifying weak anti-localization and topological-insulator-like behavior at low temperature.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: The paper likely contains experimental crystal growth and magneto-transport measurement data, but no accessible dataset or supplementary/source data was identified from the available information.
